texto: You can't talk about life without talking about politics. You have to have both. If you're just a political person, you're going to burn out. If you, as an artist, are just focused inward, you're going to eventually be irrelevant.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Robert Adams sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “You can't talk about life without talking about politics. You have to have both. If you're just a…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a vida, political, artist, útil em momentos de political e artist.

texto: When art is defined by Damien Hirst and Jeff Koons, you've got a society that's impoverished.
explicacao: Citação de Robert Adams sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “When art is defined by Damien Hirst and Jeff Koons, you've got a society that's impoverished.” articula reflexao, art, you em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como you e defined.

texto: ...if we consider the difference between William Henry Jackson packing in his cameras by mule, and the person stepping out of his car to take a picture with an Instamatic, it becomes clear how some of our space has vanished; if the time it takes to cross space is a way by which we define it, then to arrive at a view of space 'in no time' is to have denied its reality.
explicacao: Citação de Robert Adams sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “...if we consider the difference between William Henry Jackson packing in his cameras by mule, an…” articula reflexao, photography, space em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
